title: Chutes
description: Hollow vertical blocks to funnel dropped items or other entities.
body:
Chutes is a simple mod that adds 2 new blocks: the Wooden Chute and the Wooden Entry Chute.

![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/O0IWXueP/images/a8c8fe3741d0435851199718aa99f45636f48223.png)

These act exactly as you would expect from looking at them, they are nothing more than hollow vertical blocks. They can have several uses, such as:
* Funnelling dropped items launched from Droppers and such.
* Making compact elevators with the help of fans.
* Making air filled holes through water.

Of course, you can do all of these things with an empty space surrounded by solid blocks on all 4 sides, but Chutes do that in only a single block's space on top of being cheaper.
